task_completion.description: The agent accesses the export or save functionality in EdrawMax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is visible with the 'File' menu, 'Export & Send' panel, or a 'Save As'/'Export' dialog box open.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the export settings for the PDF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog is visible showing the destination directory as 'exports' (inside Documents), the file name entered as 'diagram_export.pdf', and the file type/format selected as PDF.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the export settings for the PNG file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog is visible showing the destination directory as 'exports' (inside Documents), the file name entered as 'diagram_export.png', and the file type/format selected as PNG or Graphics.

task_completion.description: Both the PDF and PNG files are successfully created in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window displays the contents of the '~/Documents/exports/' directory, clearly showing both 'diagram_export.pdf' and 'diagram_export.png' present.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical interface to perform the exports.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with EdrawMax menus, buttons, and save dialogs to export the files, rather than using terminal commands to generate them.

integrity.description: The agent did not create empty or dummy files to bypass the export process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'touch diagram_export.pdf', 'echo > diagram_export.png', or copying unrelated files to the target directory.

integrity.description: The export process appears genuine and originates from the open diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for EdrawMax export progress bars, success notifications, or trial version watermark warnings that typically appear when exporting a file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output directory is explicitly '/home/ga/Documents/exports/'. The expected filenames are 'diagram_export.pdf' and 'diagram_export.png'. Both exported files must have a minimum size of 5000 bytes, and the PNG image must have minimum dimensions of 100x100 pixels.
